title: Infinite Aged Care (Cornubia) Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: The Aged Care Quality and Safety Commission entered an Enforceable Undertaking with Infinite Aged Care (Cornubia) Pty Ltd as part of a sector-wide enforcement round (announced 13 January 2025) against 11 providers found to be falling well short of mandatory care minutes targets for residents over successive quarters.
scope: Entered an Enforceable Undertaking with the Aged Care Quality and Safety Commission; Named among 11 providers found to be falling well short of mandatory resident care-minutes targets
primary_sources: Aged Care Quality and Safety Commission
